Specialties include trauma, prenatal and postpartum depression and anxiety, at-risk adolescents, depression, anxiety, parenting support, acculturation, and immigration issues. 11740 SW Warner Avenue Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on Hispanic and Latinx communities Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 596-2222 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BALANCE CENTER FOR CHILDREN AND FAMILIES BILINGUAL MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES
